title: sphenopholis nitida var. glabra
intro: Sphenopholis nitida var. glabra, also known as the smooth or glabrous sphenopholis, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Sphenopholis nitida var. glabra include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory problems, and promote wound healing. Sphenopholis nitida var. glabra can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
